Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network connector.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network connector.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 140  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws[a-zA-Z-]*:lambda:(eusc-)?[a-z]{2}((-gov)|(-iso([a-z]?)))?-[a-z]+-\d{1}:\d{12}:network-connector:[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+(:[1-9]|[1-9][0-9]+)?)$  
Update requires: No interruption

Name.description: A unique name for the network connector within your account and Region. Must be 1 to 64 alphanumeric characters, hyphens, or underscores.
Name.markdownDescription:
A unique name for the network connector within your account and Region. Must be 1 to 64 alphanumeric characters, hyphens, or underscores.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 140  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws[a-zA-Z-]*:lambda:(eusc-)?[a-z]{2}((-gov)|(-iso([a-z]?)))?-[a-z]+-\d{1}:\d{12}:network-connector:[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+(:[1-9]|[1-9][0-9]+)?)|[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$  
Update requires: No interruption

VpcEgressConfiguration.description: The VPC egress configuration for the network connector. Specifies the subnets, security groups, and network protocol for routing outbound traffic through your VPC.

SubnetIds.description: The IDs of the VPC subnets where Lambda provisions elastic network interfaces (ENIs). Specify 1 to 16 subnets. All subnets must be in the same VPC.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^subnet-[0-9a-z]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

SubnetIds.markdownDescription:
The IDs of the VPC subnets where Lambda provisions elastic network interfaces (ENIs). Specify 1 to 16 subnets. All subnets must be in the same VPC.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

SecurityGroupIds.description: The IDs of the VPC security groups to attach to the ENIs. Specify 0 to 5 security groups. All security groups must be in the same VPC as the subnets.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^sg-[0-9a-zA-Z]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

SecurityGroupIds.markdownDescription:
The IDs of the VPC security groups to attach to the ENIs. Specify 0 to 5 security groups. All security groups must be in the same VPC as the subnets.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

NetworkProtocol.description: The network protocol for the connector. Specify IPv4 for IPv4-only networking, or DualStack for both IPv4 and IPv6.
NetworkProtocol.markdownDescription:
The network protocol for the connector. Specify IPv4 for IPv4-only networking, or DualStack for both IPv4 and IPv6.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IPv4 | DualStack  
Update requires: No interruption

AssociatedComputeResourceTypes.description: The types of Lambda compute resources that can use this connector. Currently, only MicroVm is supported.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MicroVm  
Update requires: No interruption

AssociatedComputeResourceTypes.markdownDescription:
The types of Lambda compute resources that can use this connector. Currently, only MicroVm is supported.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

VpcEgressConfiguration.markdownDescription:
The VPC egress configuration for the network connector. Specifies the subnets, security groups, and network protocol for routing outbound traffic through your VPC.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that Lambda assumes to manage elastic network interfaces in your VPC. This role must have permissions for ec2:CreateNetworkInterface and related describe operations.
RoleArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the IAM role that Lambda assumes to manage elastic network interfaces in your VPC. This role must have permissions for ec2:CreateNetworkInterface and related describe operations.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 10000  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws[a-zA-Z-]*)?:iam::\d{12}:role/?[a-zA-Z_0-9+=,.@\-_/]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

State.description: The current state of the network connector.
State.markdownDescription:
The current state of the network connector.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: PENDING | ACTIVE | INACTIVE | FAILED | DELETING | DELETE_FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: A key-value pair that provides metadata for the network connector.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag.

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Config.description: The network configuration for the connector. Specify a VpcEgressConfiguration to enable outbound traffic routing through your VPC.
Config.markdownDescription:
The network configuration for the connector. Specify a VpcEgressConfiguration to enable outbound traffic routing through your VPC.

---

Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: A list of tags to apply to the network connector. Use tags to categorize network connectors for cost allocation, access control, or operational management.

Update requires: No interruption
